language.label: Language
language.description: Interface language. 'System' follows your computer's language.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Theme, accent color and interface density.
appearance.themeDescription: Dark, light or follow the system. Changes apply instantly.
appearance.accentDescription: Color for the "{workspace}" workspace: tints its avatar and the app highlights while it's active. Each workspace has its own.
appearance.accentNoWorkspace: Select a workspace to set its main color.
appearance.densityDescription: Scales the spacing of the entire interface (via zoom).
appearance.fontSizeDescription: Scales the text (and the whole UI) — small, medium or large.
appearance.codeThemeDescription: Recolors the whole app and code syntax highlighting.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.resetOnboardingDescription: Clears the onboarding state. The wizard reappears on next launch. Does not delete workspaces or data — only the completion flag.
advanced.moreOptions: More options are coming in the next phases: experimental flags, database path, export memory, reindex project, developer mode.

billing.title: Subscription
billing.description: Your current plan and what's coming.
billing.localBlurb: Free — everything runs on your machine. Your data, agents and conversations stay local, no server.
billing.cloudDescription: A cloud team tier for those who want to collaborate. In development.
billing.cloudCtaTitle: Orkestral Cloud is not available yet

features.team: Team: invite people and share workspaces

data.title: Data
data.description: Everything stays on your machine, in ~/.orkestral. Export, open the folder or clear the cache.
data.maintenanceDescription: Export your data, open the folder in Finder, or clear the window cache.
data.cleanupNoWorkspace: Select a workspace to analyze cleanup.
data.cleanupConfirmPrompt: Apply the suggested cleanups? This cannot be undone.
data.cleanupNotifyBody: The local base has {items} low-use item(s) to review ({bytes}).
data.exportDescription: Generates a JSON with workspaces, agents, conversations, messages, issues and knowledge pages.
data.clearCacheDescription: Removes the window's HTTP/session cache. Does not delete database data.

general.title: General
general.description: Your profile and basic Orkestral preferences.
general.nameDescription: Used in greetings and in agent prompts.
general.aliasesDescription: Nicknames, handles and other identifiers, comma-separated.
general.timezoneDescription: Orkestral uses the time zone detected by the device.
general.useDeviceTz: Use this device to determine the time zone
general.upToDate: You are on the latest version

models.title: Models
models.description: Available adapters and the models each one exposes. Executor agents use the local Forge by default; on risk or unavailability, they escalate to the agent's premium model.
models.noModels: No models detected (configure the adapter to list them).
models.routingDescription: Controls when local Forge can take eligible execution work and when it should hand back to the premium CLI.
models.routingPremiumLabel: Premium fallback when local can't resolve
models.routingPremiumDescription: On (default): the Forge tries to resolve locally first and, if it can't after the configured attempts, the premium model takes over and finishes the job. Off: the issue stays blocked asking for help (max-savings mode).
models.routingEnabledDescription: When enabled, Orkestral tries Forge locally for eligible work to preserve the Claude/Codex session.
models.routingModeDescription: Defines whether local only observes, asks for approval, or tries execution before escalating to the CLI.
models.routingRiskDescription: Limits the maximum risk Forge can try locally before handing back to the premium CLI.
models.routingPreserveDescription: When escalation happens, the context and routing reason follow the run so Claude/Codex can continue without losing the thread.
models.routingApprovalDescription: Shows the routing decision before sending an eligible phase to the local model.
models.routingLocalPhases: Current local phases: classification, search/RAG, KB summaries, agent assignment, cleanup suggestions and eligible code patches with rollback/fallback.

agent.title: Agent behavior
agent.description: How the agent decides, retries and escalates — separate from the available models.
agent.fallbackDescription: How many times the local Forge insists on its own before calling the premium model to make sure the task finishes.
agent.attemptsDescription: The local Forge tries to resolve the issue this many times (each attempt is a full run) before falling back to premium. More attempts = more savings; fewer = finishes faster via premium.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Orkestral runs locally. These preferences are saved on your machine.
privacy.telemetryDescription: Today the app does NOT collect or send telemetry — nothing leaves your machine. This option is saved as your preference for when/if optional metrics are added.
privacy.maskSecretsDescription: Preference to hide detected tokens/keys before sending context to the models. Saved as a preference; the masking engine is still under construction.
privacy.blockSensitiveDescription: Preference to never attach files like .env / private keys to the context. Saved as a preference; automatic enforcement arrives with the context collector.
privacy.clearBrowsingDescription: Removes the window's HTTP and session cache. Does not delete anything from your local database.
privacy.clearChatDescription: Deletes ALL conversations and messages from the "{name}" workspace. Irreversible action.
privacy.clearChatNoWorkspace: Select a workspace to delete the chat history.
privacy.clearChatConfirmPrompt: Delete everything? This cannot be undone.

system.title: System
system.launchDescription: Starts automatically when you log into your computer.
system.petDescription: Floating mascot that stays on top of everything showing agent status.
system.petSoundDescription: Play a sound when a card appears on the pet.
system.petDndDescription: The pet keeps showing status, but without cards or sound.
system.petNotifExecutionDescription: Card when an agent completes or fails a task.
system.petNotifInboxDescription: Card when a new proposal arrives in the Inbox.
system.petNotifUpdatesDescription: Card when a new app version has been downloaded.
system.notificationSoundDescription: Play a sound for reminders and important alerts.
system.inboxNotificationsDescription: Notify (visual + sound) when a new task arrives in the Inbox.
system.timeFormatDescription: How times are displayed by the app.
system.showAppInDescription: Controls the app's visibility when closed.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Keyboard shortcuts available today. This list reflects exactly what's active in the app.

support.title: Support
support.description: Version, source code and troubleshooting help.

team.title: Team
team.agentsNote: AI agents are not team members — they are managed in Agents (in the sidebar). This screen is only for human teammates.
team.inviteLocalBlurb: Invite people when Orkestral Cloud arrives. On the Local plan everything runs only on your machine.
team.inviteTeamBlurb: Invite people to your team workspace.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.activeDescription: The data, archive and delete below act on the workspace selected here.
workspace.archiveDescription: The workspace disappears from the switcher but all data (sessions, agents, cloned code) is preserved. You can unarchive it here later.
workspace.deleteDescription: Deletes the workspace, agents, conversations and messages. The directory cloned in ~/.orkestral/workspaces is not removed — delete it manually to free up disk.
workspace.archivedDescription: Restore to see them again in the switcher or delete permanently.
workspace.confirmDeleteBodySuffix: , along with all associated agents, conversations and messages. The directory cloned on disk stays intact.
workspace.confirmArchiveBodySuffix: will disappear from the switcher but the data is kept. You can restore it here later.
workspace.confirmDeleteWarning: There is no way to undo this.

audio.title: Audio
audio.description: Audio devices used by voice dictation.
audio.outputUnsupported: Output selection is not supported on this system.
audio.permissionDescription: Grant microphone access to see and pick devices.
audio.permissionDenied: Microphone access denied. Enable it in system permissions.
